title: Ethics Committee Vision and Mission
content: Vision and Mission Vision To establish the highest standards of ethics among all the higher education stakeholders that outline the accountability, integrity, and excellence of its members and their profession. Mission - To install high patterns of discipline that meets global standards and makes students technologically superior and ethically strong. - To establish an honest culture for reporting of consequences of unethical behavior. - To make the system ethically strong and transparent for their employees, students, and others. - To inculcate various ethical values along all the horizons that meet the Quality-of-Service in education.
